title: BUBUSTEIN's Roleplay Collection
description: This is the official roleplay modpack used by BUBUSTEIN's Roleplay Server!
body:
Hello! This page has the modpacks used by BUBUSTEIN. BUBUSTEIN created those modpacks. You aren't allowed to modify them! All screenshots were made in the play.bubustein.tk server! [](https://modrinth.com/mod/bubustein-money) [](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bubusteins-vanilla)

Roleplay Modpack: play.bubustein.tk

Join my discord server first. Whitelist = ON

^ This button is clickable **Performance:** This modpack has performance mods for a better experience. (like Sodium, WI-ZOOM, etc.) **Transit:** This modpack also have: - Trains; - Airplanes; - Trams; - Cars. **Decoration:** We also have furniture mods. **Other Mods**: - Food mod; - Gun mod; - Better Ping Display ( in the tab list it appears in ms) - Better F3 - etc. Croptopia doesn't have a Modrinth page. Here is the direct download link. Croptopia: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia/ Resourcepack link: https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
